headline: U.S. Rescues Second F-15 Pilot Shot Down in Iran
deck: The successful extraction of the crew member follows the downing of a U.S. F-15 jet in Iranian territory—a development confirmed by President Donald Trump on his social media platform.
body: The United States has successfully rescued the second crew member of a U.S. F-15 jet. This significant development marks a critical turn in an ongoing situation in the region.

The rescue operation focused on the second pilot from an F-15 aircraft that was previously shot down in Iran. Details surrounding the downing of the jet remain sparse, but the recovery effort has now concluded for both crew members.

The incident involving the F-15 jet being shot down in Iran has drawn considerable international attention. The successful rescue of both pilots underscores the complexities and risks inherent in current geopolitical dynamics.

Sources close to the event described the rescue as 'miraculous,' highlighting the extreme challenges and dangers involved in extracting personnel from a hostile environment. Such operations are often fraught with peril.
President Donald Trump publicly confirmed the rescue of the second pilot. His statement provided official acknowledgment of the successful operation.

The President utilized his social media platform to deliver the confirmation. This method of communication has become a characteristic element of his administration's public messaging on sensitive and breaking news.
